g.text: state : string '' phase: Draft | Refining | Backlog
basedOn? : int '' set ⇒ revision of vN
upsert(task) : void '' persists refine_log + phase + waiting_on
claims() : Map<taskId, Claim> '' same runtime-fact channel as execution
Strategy (green, PURE) sees only DATA (task + refine_log) → returns a RefineStep.
Driver (orange) spawns workers, appends artifacts, writes waiting_on/phase, claims.
Strategy never holds a session handle / path → unit-tests with a fabricated log.
step→review ⇒ driver spawns ReviewerWorker ⇒ APPENDS Reviewed{verdict,feedback}
next scan: step reads the new Reviewed entry ⇒ branch:
No cycle counter stored — everything is read off the append-only log.
A step's APPEND is the commit point; claim (Coordinator) de-dups in-flight
work and goes stale on crash ⇒ step re-issued (idempotent, worst case one
re-run). cursor = project(refine_log), derived every scan — never persisted.
